## Scope

- [ ] Core engine
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Storage / checkpoint state
- [ ] Scripts / pilot
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Tests / CI

## Safety boundary

- [ ] No secrets, private memory dumps, raw chat logs, browser data, token stores, or unrelated local-directory scanning.
- [ ] Examples are synthetic or public-safe.
- [ ] Insights are labeled as hypotheses unless backed by primary evidence.
- [ ] No autonomous action execution, hosted telemetry, or hosted memory sync added without explicit design review.
